description: Create python_bridge_v2/ copy with all 5 upgrades: circuit breaker (groupthink detection), logging rotation + Telegram/Discord notifications, position reconciliation on startup, walk-forward validation harness, and comprehensive unit/integration tests.
steps: 1. Copy python_bridge/ to python_bridge_v2/ and Python_Bridge_EA.mq5 to Python_Bridge_EA_v2.mq5
2. Implement circuit breaker (GroupthinkCircuitBreaker) tracking model agreement, CAUTION/DANGER levels, and Bayesian groupthink_penalty evidence
3. Add logging rotation (RotatingFileHandler, 10MB/5 backups) to main.py setup_logging()
4. Create notifications/notifier.py with Telegram/Discord support (opt-in, disabled by default)
5. Create strategies/position_reconciler.py that reads EA positions CSV on startup
6. Add WritePositionsCSV() to Python_Bridge_EA_v2.mq5 (writes all open positions every timer cycle)
7. Create validation/walk_forward.py with train/validate window sliding, ensemble vs baseline comparison, JSON report output
8. Integrate all new features into main.py (circuit breaker, notifier, reconciler)
9. Add groupthink_danger and groupthink_caution to BayesianConfidence _LIKELIHOODS in trading_brain.py
acceptance_criteria: All 40 new tests pass: python -m pytest tests/test_v2_features.py -q
Full v2 test suite passes (571 pass, 1 pre-existing failure)
Original python_bridge/ and Python_Bridge_EA.mq5 are completely untouched (git diff shows no changes)
Circuit breaker detects CAUTION at 85%+ agreement for 2 cycles, DANGER at 95%+ for 3 cycles
Position reconciler reads positions CSV and recovers state on startup
Walk-forward validator produces JSON report comparing ensemble vs baseline
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/Claude && git diff python_bridge/ Python_Bridge_EA.mq5 update_and_run.bat
findings: All 40 new tests pass. Full v2 test suite: 571 pass, 1 pre-existing failure (PriceStructureConfig test expects 0.15 penalty but config has 0.05 - same in both v1 and v2). The v2 bridge initializes correctly with all new features. Circuit breaker starts in NORMAL state. Notifier is disabled by default (opt-in). Position reconciler gracefully handles missing files. Walk-forward validator works with sklearn HistGradientBoosting as a fallback when full ensemble is not trained.
